_comment: WC2026 Group K. Standings before this match: Portugal 1 pt (1-1 vs DR Congo), Colombia 3 (3-1 vs Uzbekistan), DR Congo 1, Uzbekistan 0. Portugal the clear quality side but drew their opener; Uzbekistan a World Cup debutant that lost 1-3 to Colombia. Calibrated as a strong-favorite vs limited-underdog spot, in line with the market. Referee/XIs not yet confirmed -> cards not modelled; recalibrate with confirmed lineups ~60 min before kickoff.

meta.stakes: Portugal (1 pt after a 1-1 draw with DR Congo) needs a win to take control of the group; Uzbekistan (0 pts, World Cup debutant, lost 1-3 to Colombia) must respond to stay alive. A clear favourite vs a limited underdog.

home.name: Portugal
notes: Elite squad; only drew 1-1 with a decent DR Congo in the opener (mild underperformance, not a level concern). attack 1.56.
Solid defensively -> low Uzbekistan lambda, defense 0.80.
Calibrated in line with the market (~73%): don't lean below an elite favourite (Spain lesson). Wants the win to control the group -> will push, rho -0.08.

away.name: Uzbekistan
notes: World Cup debutant; competitive but limited, lost 1-3 to Colombia (scored 1). attack 0.70.
Calibrated in line with the market: don't overrate the debutant.
